articles.title: Titans eye top two finish as they face a CSK team living on a prayer
articles.description: MS Dhoni has gone back home to Ranchi but will join CSK if they make the playoffs

articles.title: KKR opt to bowl; Hardik and Suryakumar return for MI
articles.description: KKR bring Rovman Powell in place of Pathirana

articles.title: Masood leaves captaincy future to PCB but calls for 'structural' changes
articles.description: After a series loss to Bangladesh, Pakistan captain urged his side to reflect on recurring failures and address the "root causes" behind their slide in Tests

articles.title: Taijul takes six as Bangladesh complete 2-0 sweep
articles.description: Rizwan's 94 went in vain as Pakistan fell 78 short of their target of 437

articles.title: Pat Cummins: 'My priority is Australian cricket'
articles.description: Cummins says playing cricket for Australia and the IPL are the main focuses for the "next few years at least"

articles.title: Bumrah rested for Afghanistan Test; Rahul replaces Pant as vice-captain
articles.description: Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli are in the ODI squad as India build towards the 2027 World Cup

articles.title: England captain Nat Sciver-Brunt out of New Zealand, India T20Is
articles.description: Sciver-Brunt needs further rehabilitation on calf injury with T20 World Cup looming

articles.title: Former Australia and Queensland wicketkeeper John Maclean dies aged 80
articles.description: John Maclean played four Tests and two ODIs for Australia in 1978-79

articles.title: MJK Smith, former England and Warwickshire captain, dies aged 92
articles.description: Batter led England in 25 of his 50 Tests, and also claimed an England cap as a fly-half in rugby union

articles.title: Lanka Premier League returns after two years, opener set for July 17
articles.description: Sri Lanka's T20 franchise competition returns for the first time since its 2024 edition, with the player draft scheduled for June 1

articles.title: Shan Masood leaves captaincy future to PCB after Bangladesh drubbing
articles.description: The 2-0 series whitewash takes Masood’s tally to 12 losses in 16 matches. Only two skippers, Brendan Taylor and Shakib Al Hasan, have lost more games in their first 16 games as captains.

articles.title: Ireland announce 15-member squad for Women's T20 World Cup, Gaby Lewis named captain
articles.description: Ireland finished second in the ICC Women’s T20 World Cup Global Qualifier Super Six stage to book their place in this summer’s tournament.

articles.title: Shanto urges ICC for Tests against ‘Big Three’ after historic Pakistan triumph
articles.description: The Bangla Tigers sealed a 2-0 series triumph with a 78-run victory in the second and final Test at the Sylhet International Cricket Stadium.

articles.title: 'Shreyas Iyer is one of the main contenders' - Ricky Ponting on India's future T20 captain amid talks of Suryakumar Yadav's snub
articles.description: "I think there are several contenders, but he's (Shreyas Iyer) one of the main contenders as far as I’m concerned," Ponting said.
